message:
fix(ci): clone all sibling path deps (frankensqlite, franken_agent_detection)

The project has path dependencies on three sibling repos:
asupersync, frankensqlite, and franken_agent_detection. All three
must be cloned before the build step can succeed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -67,8 +67,10 @@ jobs:
       - name: Clone sibling dependencies
         shell: bash
         run: |
-          # asupersync is referenced as a path dependency (../asupersync)
+          # Path dependencies reference sibling directories (../repo)
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git ../asupersync
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite.git ../frankensqlite
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection.git ../franken_agent_detection
 
       - name: Install Rust stable
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
